◎简　　介  

　　Prince Duncan (Kirk Barker) from a small European country who steals away his incognito to the U.S. in search of true love to escape an arranged marriage to a woman he doesn't love. While there he falls in love with Emma (Viva Bianca) a diner waitress whose struggling to keep her diner open and her christmas needs some considerable brightening.
